Pear Tree
About Programs Admissions Parents Staff Contact Give

Support Pear Tree

Invest in education that transforms.

80% of our families receive financial aid. Tuition alone covers only a fraction of what it costs to deliver our Montessori, social justice, and nature-based curriculum.

When you give to Pear Tree, you are making it possible for a child to stay.

Annual Fund

Every gift, at any level, sustains the education our students depend on.

Up to $99

Seeds

Provides art supplies for a classroom for one month

$100 – $499

Roots

Funds a field trip for an entire class

$500 – $999

Branches

Equips a classroom with new Montessori materials

$1,000 – $2,499

Canopy

Provides professional development for a teacher

$2,500 – $4,999

Orchard

Funds a semester of aftercare scholarships

$5,000+

Founders' Circle

Provides a full-year scholarship for one student

Make your gift.

Choose a one-time or monthly contribution at any amount.

[ Donorbox donation form will be embedded here ]

To embed: replace this div with
<script src="https://donorbox.org/widget.js"></script>

Your gift may be tax-deductible. Contact us for details about our fiscal sponsorship arrangement.

The Orchard

Sustain us, monthly.

Monthly donors are the roots that sustain Pear Tree year-round. By joining The Orchard, you provide predictable, sustained support that allows us to plan ahead and serve more families.

$10/mo

Art supplies

$25/mo

Student materials

$50/mo

Program support

$100/mo

Scholarship fund

$250/mo

Faculty development

Custom

Any amount helps

Other ways to support.

01

Classroom Wishlist

Purchase specific items our classrooms need — from Montessori materials to art supplies — shipped directly to the school.

02

Employer Matching

Many Bay Area employers — Google, Apple, Meta, Salesforce — match charitable gifts up to $10,000/year. Double your impact.

03

Volunteer

Join our community as a volunteer. Parents contribute required annual volunteer hours — and we welcome community members too.

Annual Event

5th Annual Walk-a-Thon

April 26, 2026 · Oakland Tech High School Track & Field

Join families, students, and supporters for our biggest community fundraiser of the year.

Get Involved

Pear Tree Community School

A social justice Montessori school in Oakland serving preschool through 5th grade. No family will be turned away.

Campuses

8100 Winthrope St (Preschool)

6925 Chabot Rd (Elementary)

Connect

(510) 817-4690
